---
title: "Explainable Credit Risk Assessment using LightGBM"

---

This project aims to create an explainable AI framework in evaluating credit risk using LightGBM, which is an advanced gradient boosting machine learning model.
It uses machine learning to assess the risk of defaulting on loans by borrowers.
To make the model more transparent, it has been integrated with SHAP explanations.
The project is expected to be beneficial in making responsible decisions in financial organizations.
I sincerely thank Dr. Cohen Achraf for his guidance and support throughout this project.


![](images/Credit_risk_home_page.png)

Here, You can learn more about me on the "About" tab. My individual literature contributions are available on the "Literature" tab. The complete project report is available on the "Report" tab.
